action.description: §25.2 action vocabulary. REQUIRED — `audit_who {}` is an aimless dump (§29.6 anti-pattern), so the caller must name what they're looking for.

target_id.description: Narrow to one target (e.g. registry job id, webhook id).

since.description: Window start (unix epoch seconds). Default: now - 7 days.

until.description: Window end (unix epoch seconds). Default: now.
